innateAbility.name: Mischief
innateAbility.description: Changes Monkey King's shape using the environment nearby to deceive opponents. Taking damage, attacking, or using any item or ability breaks the disguise.Negates damage for a brief moment upon transforming.

abilities.name: Boundless Strike
abilities.description: Slams his enlarged staff against the ground with True Strike, stunning enemy units in a line and damaging them with a critical strike instant attack.

abilities.name: Tree Dance
abilities.description: Jumps to a tree and perches atop it.If the tree Wukong's is perched on is destroyed, he falls and then stuns himself.

abilities.name: Primal Spring
abilities.description: Springs out from his tree perch, damaging and slowing enemy units in proprotion to the channel duration toward the landing area.

abilities.name: Spring Early
abilities.description: Monkey King can spring off earlier on the current tree, this immediately ends Primal Spring.

abilities.name: Jingu Mastery
abilities.description: Grants certain bonuses after a number of attacks on the same enemy hero within a duration.

abilities.name: Wukong's Command
abilities.description: Creates a circular formation of soldiers that spread out from his position.Grants Wukong bonus armor for its duration.

abilities.name: Changing of the Guard
abilities.description: Monkey King takes the place of the soldier closest to the target location, leaving another one in his stead. While transfigured, Monkey King is indistinguishable from other soldiers and invulnerable, but can't issue commands.

abilities.name: Clone Inventory
abilities.description: These unselectable and uncontrollable Clones cannot use the items' active abilities. However, the items' passive effects are applied conditionally.
